## Tool Name

<!-- Full name of the AI coding tool -->

## Tool URL

<!-- Link to the tool's official website or documentation -->

## Why This Tool Needs Coverage

<!-- Why is this tool important for enterprise security? Approximate user base, enterprise adoption, etc. -->

## Configuration Surface

<!-- What settings/files does this tool use for configuration? Where are they located? -->

## Known Security Concerns

<!-- What security risks does this tool introduce? What would you want to restrict? -->

## Enterprise Management

<!-- Does this tool have an admin console, MDM support, or server-managed settings? -->

## Would You Contribute?

<!-- Are you willing to help write the configuration templates? -->
- [ ] Yes, I can contribute configs
- [ ] No, I'm requesting someone else to create them
